title: Blueprint Signature
description: A cryptographic proof binding a mark or a whole Blueprint to its author. Normative prose: docs/specs/vocabulary/signature.md. This schema encodes well-formedness only; cryptographic validity, canonical-form computation, and identity binding are verifier concerns.

id.description: Unique identifier for this signature within the Blueprint.

mark.description: The literal string "blueprint" for a whole-document signature, or the `id` of a mark in the Blueprint's marks array.

algorithm.description: Signing algorithm. Named algorithms are the closed 0.1.0-draft set. Extensions MUST use the x-/ext. namespace.

public_key.description: Author's public key, base64url-encoded (RFC 4648 §5, no padding).

key_binding.description: Optional reference establishing the author's identity (URI, DID, X.509 chain, or a structured object). Shape is intentionally open: this specification does not prescribe an identity system in 0.1.0-draft.
